About Me

Hello! I'm Gowtham 👋

I am a Robotics Engineer passionate about ROS2, Navigation, Perception, Autonomous Systems and Embedded Systems.

I love building robots that move, think, and interact. Most of my work involves ROS2 navigation pipelines, SLAM, depth-based obstacle detection, embedded controllers, and real-world robotic testing.

I’m currently improving my robotics fundamentals (control systems, kinematics, computer vision) and building projects to grow as a full-stack robotics engineer.
